title: Eva 20 ending question
wikitext:
[]: Eva 2.0 ending question...(spoilers!)             Quote Post by xxtomboxx » Sun Sep 27, 2009 12:35 am Hi everyone! So I just watched Eva 2.0 for the second time and had a quick question to ask. I know the "right" answer cant be given until we've seen the whole series but I was wondering wat everyone thinks of the start of third impact at the end of the movie. We all know that for SEELE to accomplish its goal, NERV must destroy all the angels before instrumentality can be started. (I've always seen it as sort of a "test" for humanity to prove itself to Lilith that they are the ones who should "evolve".) Anyway, what do you all think would have happened if Kaworu hadn't stopped 3rd impact after the credits? Since all the angels hadnt been taken care of, do you think SEELE's version of instrumentality would no longer be possible? Would the angels inherit the earth? Since unit 01 is now "like a god" (lilith in body and soul, while also possessing an S2 engine from Zeruel) would it be just like 3rd impact from EoE? Sorry, lots of questions. Feel free to throw in ur ideas!

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Sep 27, 2009 12:45 am Dont assume that there are more angels, if The Big K isnt one then its possible that Zeruel is the last one.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Sep 27, 2009 12:56 am No, it isn't. In 1.0, Gendo says something about needing to wipe out eight more Angels during the fight against the 6th Angel. So, the 6th, 3rd, 7th, 8th, 9th, and 10th have all been defeated. That leaves the 11th and 12th to make eight. EDIT: Oh, and on topic-ness... I have no clue either, really.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Sep 27, 2009 1:17 am No, it isn't. In 1.0, Gendo says something about needing to wipe out eight more Angels during the fight against the 6th Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Sep 27, 2009 1:41 am http://www.tesuji.org/images/eva1.11_8_remaining_angels.jpg

(I've always seen it as sort of a "test" for humanity to prove itself to Lilith that they are the ones who should "evolve".) Anyway, what do you all think would have happened if Kaworu hadn't stopped 3rd impact after the credits? Since all the angels hadnt been taken care of, do you think SEELE's version of instrumentality would no longer be possible? Would the angels inherit the earth? Since unit 01 is now "like a god" (lilith in body and soul, while also possessing an S2 engine from Zeruel) would it be just like 3rd impact from EoE? Sorry, lots of questions. Feel free to throw in ur ideas!

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Sep 27, 2009 6:33 pm That and they probably dont want angel souls in the giant super sex orgy

[]:             Quote Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Mon Sep 28, 2009 2:44 am Axell wrote: That and they probably dont want angel souls in the giant super sex orgy
